description_long: This is a transparent glass kettle with a rounded body, featuring a blue, faceted domed lid with a knob on top. The kettle has a white arched handle and a spout with a brownish-gold accent at its base. Inside the kettle, there is a visible layer of tea and a lower compartment containing soil and blooming chamomile flowers, giving it a terrarium-like appearance. A small green button is present near the base, and a speech bubble-shaped puff of steam emerges from the side, displaying the message 'YOUR TEA IS READY.' The base of the kettle is flat and slightly raised, suggesting an integrated heating element. The overall design is whimsical and decorative, blending functionality with botanical aesthetics.
description: A transparent glass kettle with a blue domed lid, white handle, and spout, featuring an internal terrarium of chamomile flowers and a steam message reading 'YOUR TEA IS READY.' The base is flat and slightly raised, with a whimsical, decorative design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout, handle, blue domed lid, internal chamomile flowers, and the steam message 'YOUR TEA IS READY' emerging from the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steam message projection, the green button near the base, and a clear view of the internal floral arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handle and spout from behind, with the internal flowers and soil visible through the transparent body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the steam message from the back, the blue lid, and the floral terrarium inside.
